EmailTemplate.name: AES - Self-booking Invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Book time to speak with an Alliance Extra Staff Recruiter
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
BOOK TIME TO PROCCED YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Hope you're well! We are excited to proceed your application with us and have tried to reach you via phone to discuss next steps. Rather than adding to your missed calls, let us know when is a good time to talk and we'll get one of our recruiters to call you back.
BOOK A CALL WITH A RECRUITER
Once you’ve booked your interview, you’ll receive a confirmation email with all the details. We’ll also send you a reminder before your session. You can also use the link above and click on the calendar to view your bookings at any time.
Before your interview, please complete the screening pack assigned to you in your Alliance Portal.
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
